name: Iter19 — DeveloperSearch empty input does not crash app
description: When a user clicks View Profile in the DeveloperSearch widget without typing a username, the app should not crash, not navigate to a broken URL, and should stay on the current page or show a validation message.

planSteps.description: Verify the DeveloperSearch input field is visible in the navbar
Leave the DeveloperSearch input field empty and click the View Profile button
Verify the app does not crash or navigate to a broken URL like /developer/ with no username — either a validation message appears or nothing happens, and the home page content is still visible
